adaptability.name: adaptability
adaptability.shortEffect: This Pokemon's same-type attack bonus (STAB) is 2 instead of 1.5.
adaptability.effect: This Pokemon's moves that match one of its types have a same-type attack bonus (STAB) of 2 instead of 1.5.
adaptability.description: This Pokemon's same-type attack bonus (STAB) is 2 instead of 1.5.

aerilate.name: aerilate
aerilate.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Flying type and have 1.2x power.

aerilate.description: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Flying type and have 1.2x power.

aftermath.name: aftermath
aftermath.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.
aftermath.effect: If this Pokemon is knocked out with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down. If any active Pokemon has the Damp Ability, this effect is prevented.
aftermath.description: If this Pokemon is KOed with a contact move, that move's user loses 1/4 its max HP.

air-lock.name: air-lock
air-lock.shortEffect: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
air-lock.effect: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.
air-lock.description: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of weather conditions are disabled.

analytic.name: analytic
analytic.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks have 1.3x power if it is the last to move in a turn.
analytic.effect: The power of this Pokemon's move is multiplied by 1.3 if it is the last to move in a turn. Does not affect Doom Desire and Future Sight.
analytic.description: This Pokemon's attacks have 1.3x power if it is the last to move in a turn.

anger-point.name: anger-point
anger-point.shortEffect: If this Pokemon (not its substitute) takes a critical hit, its Attack is raised 12 stages.
anger-point.effect: If this Pokemon, but not its substitute, is struck by a critical hit, its Attack is raised by 12 stages.
anger-point.description: If this Pokemon (not its substitute) takes a critical hit, its Attack is raised 12 stages.

anger-shell.name: anger-shell
anger-shell.shortEffect: At 1/2 or less of this Pokemon's max HP: +1 Atk, Sp. Atk, Spe, and -1 Def, Sp. Def.
anger-shell.effect: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage from an attack bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, its Attack, Special Attack, and Speed are raised by 1 stage, and its Defense and Special Defense are lowered by 1 stage. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.
anger-shell.description: At 1/2 or less of this Pokemon's max HP: +1 Atk, Sp. Atk, Spe, and -1 Def, Sp. Def.

anticipation.name: anticipation
anticipation.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon shudders if any foe has a supereffective or OHKO move.
anticipation.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted if any opposing Pokemon has an attack that is super effective against this Pokemon, or an OHKO move. This effect considers any move that deals direct damage as an attacking move of its respective type, Hidden Power counts as its determined type, and Judgment, Multi-Attack, Natural Gift, Revelation Dance, Techno Blast, and Weather Ball are considered Normal-type moves.
anticipation.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon shudders if any foe has a supereffective or OHKO move.

arena-trap.name: arena-trap
arena-trap.shortEffect: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out unless they are airborne.
arena-trap.effect: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out unless they are airborne, are holding a Shed Shell, or are a Ghost type.
arena-trap.description: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out unless they are airborne.

armor-tail.name: armor-tail

armor-tail.effect: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.
armor-tail.description: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.

aroma-veil.name: aroma-veil
aroma-veil.shortEffect: Protects user/allies from Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, and Torment.

aroma-veil.description: Protects user/allies from Attract, Disable, Encore, Heal Block, Taunt, and Torment.

as-one-glastrier.name: as-one-glastrier

as-one-spectrier.description: Combination of the Unnerve and Grim Neigh Abilities.

aura-break.name: aura-break
aura-break.shortEffect: While this Pokemon is active, the Dark Aura and Fairy Aura power modifier is 0.75x.
aura-break.effect: While this Pokemon is active, the effects of the Dark Aura and Fairy Aura Abilities are reversed, multiplying the power of Dark- and Fairy-type moves, respectively, by 3/4 instead of 1.33.
aura-break.description: While this Pokemon is active, the Dark Aura and Fairy Aura power modifier is 0.75x.

bad-dreams.name: bad-dreams
bad-dreams.shortEffect: Causes sleeping foes to lose 1/8 of their max HP at the end of each turn.

bad-dreams.description: Causes sleeping foes to lose 1/8 of their max HP at the end of each turn.

battery.name: battery

beads-of-ruin.name: beads-of-ruin

beads-of-ruin.description: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Special Defense multiplied by 0.75.

beast-boost.name: beast-boost

berserk.name: berserk
berserk.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 1 when it reaches 1/2 or less of its max HP.
berserk.effect: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage from an attack bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, its Special Attack is raised by 1 stage. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.

blaze.description: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Fire attacks.

commander.name: commander
commander.shortEffect: If ally is Dondozo: this Pokemon cannot act or be hit, +2 to all Dondozo's stats.
commander.effect: If this Pokemon is a Tatsugiri and a Dondozo is an active ally, this Pokemon goes into the Dondozo's mouth. The Dondozo has its Attack, Special Attack, Speed, Defense, and Special Defense raised by 2 stages. During the effect, the Dondozo cannot be switched out, this Pokemon cannot select an action, and attacks targeted at this Pokemon will be avoided but it will still take indirect damage. If this Pokemon faints during the effect, a Pokemon can be switched in as a replacement but the Dondozo remains unable to be switched out. If the Dondozo faints during the effect, this Pokemon regains the ability to select an action.
commander.description: If ally is Dondozo: this Pokemon cannot act or be hit, +2 to all Dondozo's stats.

competitive.name: competitive
competitive.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 2 for each of its stats that is lowered by a foe.

This weather remains in effect until this Ability is no longer active for any Pokemon, or the weather is changed by the Desolate Land or Primordial Sea Abilities.

forecast.name: forecast
forecast.shortEffect: Castform's type changes to the current weather condition's type, except Sandstorm.
forecast.effect: If this Pokemon is a Castform, its type changes to the current weather condition's type, except Sandstorm. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella and the weather is Rain Dance or Sunny Day.
forecast.description: Castform's type changes to the current weather condition's type, except Sandstorm.

forewarn.name: forewarn
forewarn.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the foes' move with the highest power.
forewarn.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the move with the highest power, at random, known by an opposing Pokemon. This effect considers OHKO moves to have 150 power, Counter, Mirror Coat, and Metal Burst to have 120 power, every other attacking move with an unspecified power to have 80 power, and non-damaging moves to have 1 power.
forewarn.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon is alerted to the foes' move with the highest power.

friend-guard.name: friend-guard
friend-guard.shortEffect: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.
friend-guard.effect: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.
friend-guard.description: This Pokemon's allies receive 3/4 damage from other Pokemon's attacks.

frisk.name: frisk
frisk.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.
frisk.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.
frisk.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon identifies the held items of all opposing Pokemon.

full-metal-body.name: full-metal-body
full-metal-body.shortEffect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
full-metal-body.effect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
full-metal-body.description: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

gale-wings.name: gale-wings
gale-wings.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is at full HP, its Flying-type moves have their priority increased by 1.
gale-wings.effect: If this Pokemon is at full HP, its Flying-type moves have their priority increased by 1.
gale-wings.description: If this Pokemon is at full HP, its Flying-type moves have their priority increased by 1.

galvanize.name: galvanize
galvanize.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Electric type and have 1.2x power.
galvanize.effect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Electric-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.
galvanize.description: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Electric type and have 1.2x power.

gluttony.name: gluttony
gluttony.shortEffect: This Pokemon eats Berries at 1/2 max HP or less instead of their usual 1/4 max HP.
gluttony.effect: When this Pokemon is holding a Berry that usually activates with 1/4 or less of its maximum HP, it is eaten at 1/2 or less of its maximum HP instead.
gluttony.description: This Pokemon eats Berries at 1/2 max HP or less instead of their usual 1/4 max HP.

good-as-gold.name: good-as-gold
good-as-gold.shortEffect: This Pokemon is immune to Status moves.
good-as-gold.effect: This Pokemon is immune to Status moves.
good-as-gold.description: This Pokemon is immune to Status moves.

gooey.name: gooey
gooey.shortEffect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.
gooey.effect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.
gooey.description: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.

gorilla-tactics.name: gorilla-tactics
gorilla-tactics.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Attack is 1.5x, but it can only select the first move it executes.
gorilla-tactics.effect: This Pokemon's Attack is multiplied by 1.5, but it can only select the first move it executes. These effects are prevented while this Pokemon is Dynamaxed.
gorilla-tactics.description: This Pokemon's Attack is 1.5x, but it can only select the first move it executes.

grass-pelt.name: grass-pelt
grass-pelt.shortEffect: If Grassy Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
grass-pelt.effect: If Grassy Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
grass-pelt.description: If Grassy Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Defense is multiplied by 1.5.

grassy-surge.name: grassy-surge
grassy-surge.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Grassy Terrain.
grassy-surge.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Grassy Terrain.
grassy-surge.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Grassy Terrain.

grim-neigh.name: grim-neigh
grim-neigh.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
grim-neigh.effect: This Pokemon's Special Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon.
grim-neigh.description: This Pokemon's Sp. Atk is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.

guard-dog.name: guard-dog
guard-dog.shortEffect: Immune to Intimidate. Intimidated: +1 Attack. Cannot be forced to switch out.
guard-dog.effect: This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability and raises its Attack by 1 stage instead. This Pokemon cannot be forced to switch out by another Pokemon's attack or item.
guard-dog.description: Immune to Intimidate. Intimidated: +1 Attack. Cannot be forced to switch out.

gulp-missile.name: gulp-missile
gulp-missile.shortEffect: When hit after Surf/Dive, attacker takes 1/4 max HP and -1 Defense or paralysis.
gulp-missile.effect: If this Pokemon is a Cramorant, it changes forme when it hits a target with Surf or uses the first turn of Dive successfully. It becomes Gulping Form with an Arrokuda in its mouth if it has more than 1/2 of its maximum HP remaining, or Gorging Form with a Pikachu in its mouth if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP remaining. If Cramorant gets hit in Gulping or Gorging Form, it spits the Arrokuda or Pikachu at its attacker, even if it has no HP remaining. The projectile deals damage equal to 1/4 of the target's maximum HP, rounded down; this damage is blocked by the Magic Guard Ability but not by a substitute. An Arrokuda also lowers the target's Defense by 1 stage, and a Pikachu paralyzes the target. Cramorant will return to normal if it spits out a projectile, switches out, or Dynamaxes.
gulp-missile.description: When hit after Surf/Dive, attacker takes 1/4 max HP and -1 Defense or paralysis.

guts.name: guts
guts.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is statused, its Attack is 1.5x; ignores burn halving physical damage.
guts.effect: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Attack is multiplied by 1.5. This Pokemon's physical attacks ignore the burn effect of halving damage.
guts.description: If this Pokemon is statused, its Attack is 1.5x; ignores burn halving physical damage.

hadron-engine.name: hadron-engine
hadron-engine.shortEffect: On switch-in, summons Electric Terrain. During Electric Terrain, Sp. Atk is 1.3333x.
hadron-engine.effect: On switch-in, summons Electric Terrain. During Electric Terrain, Sp. Atk is 1.3333x.
hadron-engine.description: On switch-in, summons Electric Terrain. During Electric Terrain, Sp. Atk is 1.3333x.

harvest.name: harvest
harvest.shortEffect: If last item used is a Berry, 50% chance to restore it each end of turn. 100% in Sun.
harvest.effect: If the last item this Pokemon used is a Berry, there is a 50% chance it gets restored at the end of each turn. If Sunny Day is active, this chance is 100%.
harvest.description: If last item used is a Berry, 50% chance to restore it each end of turn. 100% in Sun.

healer.name: healer
healer.shortEffect: 30% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.
healer.effect: 30% chance this Pokemon's ally has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.
healer.description: 30% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.

heatproof.name: heatproof
heatproof.shortEffect: Fire damage against this Pokemon is dealt with 1/2 offensive stat; 1/2 burn damage.
heatproof.effect: If a Pokemon uses a Fire-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon. This Pokemon takes half of the usual burn damage, rounded down.
heatproof.description: Fire damage against this Pokemon is dealt with 1/2 offensive stat; 1/2 burn damage.

heavy-metal.name: heavy-metal
heavy-metal.effect: This Pokemon's weight is doubled. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone.

hospitality.name: hospitality
hospitality.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon restores 1/4 of its ally's maximum HP, rounded down.
hospitality.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon restores 1/4 of its ally's maximum HP, rounded down.
hospitality.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon restores 1/4 of its ally's maximum HP, rounded down.

hunger-switch.name: hunger-switch
hunger-switch.shortEffect: If Morpeko, it changes between Full Belly and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.
hunger-switch.effect: If this Pokemon is a Morpeko, it changes formes between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.
hunger-switch.description: If Morpeko, it changes between Full Belly and Hangry Mode at the end of each turn.

hustle.name: hustle
hustle.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Attack is 1.5x and accuracy of its physical attacks is 0.8x.
hustle.effect: This Pokemon's Attack is multiplied by 1.5 and the accuracy of its physical attacks is multiplied by 0.8.
hustle.description: This Pokemon's Attack is 1.5x and accuracy of its physical attacks is 0.8x.

hydration.name: hydration
hydration.shortEffect: This Pokemon has its status cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active.
hydration.effect: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.
hydration.description: This Pokemon has its status cured at the end of each turn if Rain Dance is active.

hyper-cutter.name: hyper-cutter
hyper-cutter.shortEffect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Attack stat stage.
hyper-cutter.effect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Attack stat stage.
hyper-cutter.description: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's Attack stat stage.

ice-body.name: ice-body
ice-body.shortEffect: If Snow is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
ice-body.effect: If Snow is active, this Pokemon restores 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn.
ice-body.description: If Snow is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.

ice-face.name: ice-face
ice-face.shortEffect: If Eiscue, the first physical hit it takes deals 0 damage. Effect is restored in Snow.
ice-face.effect: If this Pokemon is an Eiscue, the first physical hit it takes in battle deals 0 neutral damage. Its ice face is then broken and it changes forme to Noice Face. Eiscue regains its Ice Face forme when Snow begins or when Eiscue switches in while Snow is active. Confusion damage also breaks the ice face.
ice-face.description: If Eiscue, the first physical hit it takes deals 0 damage. Effect is restored in Snow.

ice-scales.name: ice-scales
ice-scales.shortEffect: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from special attacks.
ice-scales.effect: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from special attacks.
ice-scales.description: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from special attacks.

illuminate.name: illuminate
illuminate.shortEffect: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.
illuminate.effect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's accuracy stat stage. This Pokemon ignores a target's evasiveness stat stage.
illuminate.description: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.

illusion.name: illusion
illusion.shortEffect: This Pokemon appears as the last Pokemon in the party until it takes direct damage.
illusion.effect: When this Pokemon switches in, it appears as the last unfainted Pokemon in its party until it takes direct damage from another Pokemon's attack. This Pokemon's actual level and HP are displayed instead of those of the mimicked Pokemon.
illusion.description: This Pokemon appears as the last Pokemon in the party until it takes direct damage.

immunity.name: immunity
immunity.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while poisoned cures it.
immunity.effect: This Pokemon cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while poisoned cures it.
immunity.description: This Pokemon cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while poisoned cures it.

imposter.name: imposter
imposter.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it.
imposter.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it. If there is no Pokemon at that position, this Pokemon does not Transform.
imposter.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon Transforms into the opposing Pokemon that is facing it.

infiltrator.name: infiltrator
infiltrator.shortEffect: Moves ignore substitutes and foe's Reflect/Light Screen/Safeguard/Mist/Aurora Veil.
infiltrator.effect: This Pokemon's moves ignore substitutes and the opposing side's Reflect, Light Screen, Safeguard, Mist, and Aurora Veil.
infiltrator.description: Moves ignore substitutes and foe's Reflect/Light Screen/Safeguard/Mist/Aurora Veil.

innards-out.name: innards-out
innards-out.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is KOed with a move, that move's user loses an equal amount of HP.
innards-out.effect: If this Pokemon is knocked out with a move, that move's user loses HP equal to the amount of damage inflicted on this Pokemon.
innards-out.description: If this Pokemon is KOed with a move, that move's user loses an equal amount of HP.

inner-focus.name: inner-focus
inner-focus.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be made to flinch. Immune to Intimidate.
inner-focus.effect: This Pokemon cannot be made to flinch. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.
inner-focus.description: This Pokemon cannot be made to flinch. Immune to Intimidate.

insomnia.name: insomnia
insomnia.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.
insomnia.effect: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.
insomnia.description: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.

intimidate.name: intimidate
intimidate.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Attack of opponents by 1 stage.
intimidate.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Attack of opposing Pokemon by 1 stage. Pokemon with the Inner Focus, Oblivious, Own Tempo, or Scrappy Abilities and Pokemon behind a substitute are immune.
intimidate.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the Attack of opponents by 1 stage.

intrepid-sword.name: intrepid-sword
intrepid-sword.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.
intrepid-sword.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.
intrepid-sword.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage. Once per battle.

iron-barbs.name: iron-barbs
iron-barbs.shortEffect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their max HP.
iron-barbs.effect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down.
iron-barbs.description: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their max HP.

iron-fist.name: iron-fist
iron-fist.shortEffect: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have 1.2x power. Sucker Punch is not boosted.
iron-fist.effect: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have their power multiplied by 1.2.
iron-fist.description: This Pokemon's punch-based attacks have 1.2x power. Sucker Punch is not boosted.

justified.name: justified
justified.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.
justified.effect: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.
justified.description: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a Dark-type move.

keen-eye.name: keen-eye
keen-eye.shortEffect: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.
keen-eye.effect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's accuracy stat stage. This Pokemon ignores a target's evasiveness stat stage.
keen-eye.description: This Pokemon's accuracy can't be lowered by others; ignores their evasiveness stat.

klutz.name: klutz
klutz.shortEffect: This Pokemon's held item has no effect, except Macho Brace. Fling cannot be used.
klutz.effect: This Pokemon's held item has no effect. This Pokemon cannot use Fling successfully. Macho Brace, Power Anklet, Power Band, Power Belt, Power Bracer, Power Lens, and Power Weight still have their effects.
klutz.description: This Pokemon's held item has no effect, except Macho Brace. Fling cannot be used.

leaf-guard.name: leaf-guard
leaf-guard.shortEffect: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot be statused and Rest will fail for it.
leaf-guard.effect: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn, and Rest will fail for it. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.
leaf-guard.description: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon cannot be statused and Rest will fail for it.

levitate.name: levitate
levitate.shortEffect: This Pokemon is immune to Ground; Gravity/Ingrain/Smack Down/Iron Ball nullify it.
levitate.effect: This Pokemon is immune to Ground-type attacks and the effects of Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web, and the Arena Trap Ability. The effects of Gravity, Ingrain, Smack Down, Thousand Arrows, and Iron Ball nullify the immunity. Thousand Arrows can hit this Pokemon as if it did not have this Ability.
levitate.description: This Pokemon is immune to Ground; Gravity/Ingrain/Smack Down/Iron Ball nullify it.

libero.name: libero
libero.shortEffect: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
libero.effect: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.
libero.description: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.

light-metal.name: light-metal
light-metal.effect: This Pokemon's weight is halved, rounded down to a tenth of a kilogram. This effect is calculated after the effect of Autotomize, and before the effect of Float Stone. A Pokemon's weight will not drop below 0.1 kg.

lightning-rod.name: lightning-rod
lightning-rod.shortEffect: This Pokemon draws Electric moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Electric immunity.
lightning-rod.effect: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Special Attack by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move. If this Pokemon is not the target of a single-target Electric-type move used by another Pokemon, this Pokemon redirects that move to itself if it is within the range of that move. If multiple Pokemon could redirect with this Ability, it goes to the one with the highest Speed, or in the case of a tie to the one that has had this Ability active longer.
lightning-rod.description: This Pokemon draws Electric moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Electric immunity.

limber.name: limber
limber.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed. Gaining this Ability while paralyzed cures it.
limber.effect: This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed. Gaining this Ability while paralyzed cures it.
limber.description: This Pokemon cannot be paralyzed. Gaining this Ability while paralyzed cures it.

lingering-aroma.name: lingering-aroma
lingering-aroma.shortEffect: Making contact with this Pokemon has the attacker's Ability become Lingering Aroma.
lingering-aroma.effect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Lingering Aroma. Does not affect Pokemon with the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Lingering Aroma, Multitype, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.
lingering-aroma.description: Making contact with this Pokemon has the attacker's Ability become Lingering Aroma.

liquid-ooze.name: liquid-ooze
liquid-ooze.shortEffect: This Pokemon damages those draining HP from it for as much as they would heal.
liquid-ooze.effect: This Pokemon damages those draining HP from it for as much as they would heal.
liquid-ooze.description: This Pokemon damages those draining HP from it for as much as they would heal.

liquid-voice.name: liquid-voice
liquid-voice.shortEffect: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water type.
liquid-voice.effect: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water-type moves. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.
liquid-voice.description: This Pokemon's sound-based moves become Water type.

long-reach.name: long-reach
long-reach.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks do not make contact with the target.
long-reach.effect: This Pokemon's attacks do not make contact with the target.
long-reach.description: This Pokemon's attacks do not make contact with the target.

magic-bounce.name: magic-bounce
magic-bounce.shortEffect: This Pokemon blocks certain Status moves and bounces them back to the user.
magic-bounce.effect: This Pokemon is unaffected by certain non-damaging moves directed at it and will instead use such moves against the original user. Moves reflected in this way are unable to be reflected again by this or Magic Coat's effect. Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes can only be reflected once per side, by the leftmost Pokemon under this or Magic Coat's effect. The Lightning Rod and Storm Drain Abilities redirect their respective moves before this Ability takes effect.
magic-bounce.description: This Pokemon blocks certain Status moves and bounces them back to the user.

magic-guard.name: magic-guard
magic-guard.shortEffect: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks.
magic-guard.effect: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks. Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, Struggle recoil, and confusion damage are considered direct damage.
magic-guard.description: This Pokemon can only be damaged by direct attacks.

magician.name: magician
magician.shortEffect: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack.
magician.effect: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack. Does not affect Doom Desire and Future Sight.
magician.description: If this Pokemon has no item, it steals the item off a Pokemon it hits with an attack.

magma-armor.name: magma-armor
magma-armor.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be frozen. Gaining this Ability while frozen cures it.
magma-armor.effect: This Pokemon cannot be frozen. Gaining this Ability while frozen cures it.
magma-armor.description: This Pokemon cannot be frozen. Gaining this Ability while frozen cures it.

magnet-pull.name: magnet-pull
magnet-pull.shortEffect: Prevents opposing Steel-type Pokemon from choosing to switch out.
magnet-pull.effect: Prevents opposing Steel-type Pokemon from choosing to switch out, unless they are holding a Shed Shell or are a Ghost type.
magnet-pull.description: Prevents opposing Steel-type Pokemon from choosing to switch out.

marvel-scale.name: marvel-scale
marvel-scale.shortEffect: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
marvel-scale.effect: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.
marvel-scale.description: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Defense is multiplied by 1.5.

mega-launcher.name: mega-launcher
mega-launcher.shortEffect: This Pokemon's pulse moves have 1.5x power. Heal Pulse heals 3/4 target's max HP.
mega-launcher.effect: This Pokemon's pulse moves have their power multiplied by 1.5. Heal Pulse restores 3/4 of a target's maximum HP, rounded half down.
mega-launcher.description: This Pokemon's pulse moves have 1.5x power. Heal Pulse heals 3/4 target's max HP.

merciless.name: merciless
merciless.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks are critical hits if the target is poisoned.
merciless.effect: This Pokemon's attacks are critical hits if the target is poisoned.
merciless.description: This Pokemon's attacks are critical hits if the target is poisoned.

mimicry.name: mimicry
mimicry.shortEffect: This Pokemon's types change to match the Terrain. Type reverts when Terrain ends.
mimicry.effect: This Pokemon's types change to match the active Terrain when this Pokemon acquires this Ability, or whenever a Terrain begins. Electric type during Electric Terrain, Grass type during Grassy Terrain, Fairy type during Misty Terrain, and Psychic type during Psychic Terrain. If this Ability is acquired without an active Terrain, or a Terrain ends, this Pokemon's types become the original types for its species.
mimicry.description: This Pokemon's types change to match the Terrain. Type reverts when Terrain ends.

minds-eye.name: minds-eye
minds-eye.shortEffect: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Accuracy can't be lowered, ignores evasiveness.
minds-eye.effect: This Pokemon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's accuracy stat stage. This Pokemon ignores a target's evasiveness stat stage.
minds-eye.description: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Accuracy can't be lowered, ignores evasiveness.

minus.name: minus
minus.shortEffect: If an active ally has this Ability or the Plus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.
minus.effect: If an active ally has this Ability or the Plus Ability, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5.
minus.description: If an active ally has this Ability or the Plus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.

mirror-armor.name: mirror-armor
mirror-armor.shortEffect: If this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered, the attacker's are lowered instead.
mirror-armor.effect: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered by another Pokemon, that Pokemon's stat stage is lowered instead. This effect does not happen if this Pokemon's stat stage was already -6. If the other Pokemon has a substitute, neither Pokemon has its stat stage lowered.
mirror-armor.description: If this Pokemon's stat stages would be lowered, the attacker's are lowered instead.

misty-surge.name: misty-surge
misty-surge.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Misty Terrain.
misty-surge.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Misty Terrain.
misty-surge.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Misty Terrain.

mold-breaker.name: mold-breaker
mold-breaker.shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.
mold-breaker.effect: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore certain Abilities of other Pokemon. The Abilities that can be negated are Armor Tail, Aroma Veil, Aura Break, Battle Armor, Big Pecks, Bulletproof, Clear Body, Contrary, Damp, Dazzling, Disguise, Dry Skin, Earth Eater, Filter, Flash Fire, Flower Gift, Flower Veil, Fluffy, Friend Guard, Fur Coat, Good as Gold, Grass Pelt, Guard Dog, Heatproof, Heavy Metal, Hyper Cutter, Ice Face, Ice Scales, Illuminate, Immunity, Inner Focus, Insomnia, Keen Eye, Leaf Guard, Levitate, Light Metal, Lightning Rod, Limber, Magic Bounce, Magma Armor, Marvel Scale, Mind's Eye, Mirror Armor, Motor Drive, Multiscale, Oblivious, Overcoat, Own Tempo, Pastel Veil, Punk Rock, Purifying Salt, Queenly Majesty, Sand Veil, Sap Sipper, Shell Armor, Shield Dust, Simple, Snow Cloak, Solid Rock, Soundproof, Sticky Hold, Storm Drain, Sturdy, Suction Cups, Sweet Veil, Tangled Feet, Telepathy, Tera Shell, Thermal Exchange, Thick Fat, Unaware, Vital Spirit, Volt Absorb, Water Absorb, Water Bubble, Water Veil, Well-Baked Body, White Smoke, Wind Rider, Wonder Guard, and Wonder Skin. This affects every other Pokemon on the field, whether or not it is a target of this Pokemon's move, and whether or not their Ability is beneficial to this Pokemon.
mold-breaker.description: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.

moody.name: moody
moody.shortEffect: Boosts a random stat (except accuracy/evasion) +2 and another stat -1 every turn.
moody.effect: This Pokemon has a random stat, other than accuracy or evasiveness, raised by 2 stages and another stat lowered by 1 stage at the end of each turn.
moody.description: Boosts a random stat (except accuracy/evasion) +2 and another stat -1 every turn.

motor-drive.name: motor-drive
motor-drive.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by an Electric move; Electric immunity.
motor-drive.effect: This Pokemon is immune to Electric-type moves and raises its Speed by 1 stage when hit by an Electric-type move.
motor-drive.description: This Pokemon's Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by an Electric move; Electric immunity.

moxie.name: moxie
moxie.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.
moxie.effect: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and knocks out another Pokemon.
moxie.description: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 stage if it attacks and KOes another Pokemon.

multiscale.name: multiscale
multiscale.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
multiscale.effect: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
multiscale.description: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.

multitype.name: multitype
multitype.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is an Arceus, its type changes to match its held Plate.
multitype.effect: If this Pokemon is an Arceus, its type changes to match its held Plate.
multitype.description: If this Pokemon is an Arceus, its type changes to match its held Plate.

mummy.name: mummy
mummy.shortEffect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Mummy.
mummy.effect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Mummy. Does not affect Pokemon with the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Mummy, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.
mummy.description: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability changed to Mummy.

mycelium-might.name: mycelium-might
mycelium-might.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Status moves go last in their priority bracket and ignore Abilities.
mycelium-might.effect: This Pokemon's Status moves ignore certain Abilities of other Pokemon, and go last among Pokemon using the same or greater priority moves.
mycelium-might.description: This Pokemon's Status moves go last in their priority bracket and ignore Abilities.

natural-cure.name: natural-cure
natural-cure.shortEffect: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured when it switches out.
natural-cure.effect: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured when it switches out.
natural-cure.description: This Pokemon has its non-volatile status condition cured when it switches out.

neuroforce.name: neuroforce
neuroforce.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks that are super effective against the target do 1.25x damage.
neuroforce.effect: This Pokemon's attacks that are super effective against the target have their damage multiplied by 1.25.
neuroforce.description: This Pokemon's attacks that are super effective against the target do 1.25x damage.

neutralizing-gas.name: neutralizing-gas
neutralizing-gas.shortEffect: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect.
neutralizing-gas.effect: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect. This Ability activates before hazards and other Abilities take effect. Does not affect the As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Disguise, Gulp Missile, Ice Face, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Power Construct, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shift, Zen Mode, or Zero to Hero Abilities.
neutralizing-gas.description: While this Pokemon is active, Abilities have no effect.

no-guard.name: no-guard
no-guard.shortEffect: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
no-guard.effect: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.
no-guard.description: Every move used by or against this Pokemon will always hit.

normalize.name: normalize
normalize.shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves are changed to be Normal type and have 1.2x power.
normalize.effect: This Pokemon's moves are changed to be Normal type and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes before other effects that change a move's type.
normalize.description: This Pokemon's moves are changed to be Normal type and have 1.2x power.

oblivious.name: oblivious
oblivious.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Immune to Intimidate.
oblivious.effect: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Gaining this Ability while infatuated or taunted cures it. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.
oblivious.description: This Pokemon cannot be infatuated or taunted. Immune to Intimidate.

opportunist.name: opportunist
opportunist.shortEffect: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.
opportunist.effect: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.
opportunist.description: When an opposing Pokemon has a stat stage raised, this Pokemon copies the effect.

orichalcum-pulse.name: orichalcum-pulse
orichalcum-pulse.shortEffect: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.
orichalcum-pulse.effect: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.
orichalcum-pulse.description: On switch-in, summons Sunny Day. During Sunny Day, Attack is 1.3333x.

overcoat.name: overcoat
overcoat.shortEffect: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.
overcoat.effect: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, damage from Sandstorm, and the effects of Rage Powder and the Effect Spore Ability.
overcoat.description: This Pokemon is immune to powder moves, Sandstorm damage, and Effect Spore.

overgrow.name: overgrow
overgrow.shortEffect: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Grass attacks.
overgrow.effect: When this Pokemon has 1/3 or less of its maximum HP, rounded down, its offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Grass-type attack.
overgrow.description: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Grass attacks.

own-tempo.name: own-tempo
own-tempo.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Immune to Intimidate.
own-tempo.effect: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Gaining this Ability while confused cures it. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.
own-tempo.description: This Pokemon cannot be confused. Immune to Intimidate.

parental-bond.name: parental-bond
parental-bond.shortEffect: This Pokemon's damaging moves hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered.
parental-bond.effect: This Pokemon's damaging moves become multi-hit moves that hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered. Does not affect Doom Desire, Dragon Darts, Dynamax Cannon, Endeavor, Explosion, Final Gambit, Fling, Future Sight, Ice Ball, Rollout, Self-Destruct, any multi-hit move, any move that has multiple targets, or any two-turn move.
parental-bond.description: This Pokemon's damaging moves hit twice. The second hit has its damage quartered.

pastel-veil.name: pastel-veil
pastel-veil.shortEffect: This Pokemon and its allies cannot be poisoned. On switch-in, cures poisoned allies.
pastel-veil.effect: This Pokemon and its allies cannot be poisoned. Gaining this Ability while this Pokemon or its ally is poisoned cures them. If this Ability is being ignored during an effect that causes poison, this Pokemon is cured immediately but its ally is not.
pastel-veil.description: This Pokemon and its allies cannot be poisoned. On switch-in, cures poisoned allies.

perish-body.name: perish-body
perish-body.shortEffect: Making contact with this Pokemon starts the Perish Song effect for it and the attacker.
perish-body.effect: Making contact with this Pokemon starts the Perish Song effect for it and the attacker. This effect does not happen for this Pokemon if the attacker already has a perish count.
perish-body.description: Making contact with this Pokemon starts the Perish Song effect for it and the attacker.

pickpocket.name: pickpocket
pickpocket.shortEffect: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item.
pickpocket.effect: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability.
pickpocket.description: If this Pokemon has no item and is hit by a contact move, it steals the attacker's item.

pickup.name: pickup
pickup.shortEffect: If this Pokemon has no item, it finds one used by an adjacent Pokemon this turn.
pickup.effect: At the end of each turn, if this Pokemon is not holding an item and at least one adjacent Pokemon used an item during this turn, one of those Pokemon is selected at random and this Pokemon obtains that Pokemon's last used item. An item is not considered the last used if it was a popped Air Balloon, if the item was picked up by another Pokemon with this Ability, or if the item was lost to Bug Bite, Corrosive Gas, Covet, Incinerate, Knock Off, Pluck, or Thief. Items thrown with Fling can be picked up.
pickup.description: If this Pokemon has no item, it finds one used by an adjacent Pokemon this turn.

pixilate.name: pixilate
pixilate.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy type and have 1.2x power.
pixilate.effect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.
pixilate.description: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Fairy type and have 1.2x power.

plus.name: plus
plus.shortEffect: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.
plus.effect: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Special Attack is multiplied by 1.5.
plus.description: If an active ally has this Ability or the Minus Ability, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x.

poison-heal.name: poison-heal
poison-heal.shortEffect: This Pokemon is healed by 1/8 of its max HP each turn when poisoned; no HP loss.
poison-heal.effect: If this Pokemon is poisoned, it restores 1/8 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn instead of losing HP.
poison-heal.description: This Pokemon is healed by 1/8 of its max HP each turn when poisoned; no HP loss.

poison-point.name: poison-point
poison-point.shortEffect: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
poison-point.effect: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.
poison-point.description: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be poisoned.

poison-puppeteer.name: poison-puppeteer
poison-puppeteer.shortEffect: Pecharunt: If this Pokemon poisons a target, the target also becomes confused.
poison-puppeteer.effect: If this Pokemon is a Pecharunt and poisons or badly poisons a target, the target also becomes confused.
poison-puppeteer.description: Pecharunt: If this Pokemon poisons a target, the target also becomes confused.

poison-touch.name: poison-touch
poison-touch.shortEffect: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.
poison-touch.effect: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning. This effect comes after a move's inherent secondary effect chance.
poison-touch.description: This Pokemon's contact moves have a 30% chance of poisoning.

power-construct.name: power-construct
power-construct.shortEffect: If Zygarde 10%/50%, changes to Complete if at 1/2 max HP or less at end of turn.
power-construct.effect: If this Pokemon is a Zygarde in its 10% or 50% Forme, it changes to Complete Forme when it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP at the end of the turn.
power-construct.description: If Zygarde 10%/50%, changes to Complete if at 1/2 max HP or less at end of turn.

power-of-alchemy.name: power-of-alchemy
power-of-alchemy.shortEffect: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
power-of-alchemy.effect: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.
power-of-alchemy.description: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.

power-spot.name: power-spot
power-spot.shortEffect: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3.
power-spot.effect: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3. This affects Doom Desire and Future Sight, even if the user is not on the field.
power-spot.description: This Pokemon's allies have the power of their moves multiplied by 1.3.

prankster.name: prankster
prankster.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Status moves have priority raised by 1, but Dark types are immune.
prankster.effect: This Pokemon's non-damaging moves have their priority increased by 1. Opposing Dark-type Pokemon are immune to these moves, and any move called by these moves, if the resulting user of the move has this Ability.
prankster.description: This Pokemon's Status moves have priority raised by 1, but Dark types are immune.

pressure.name: pressure
pressure.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is the target of a foe's move, that move loses one additional PP.
pressure.effect: If this Pokemon is the target of an opposing Pokemon's move, that move loses one additional PP. Imprison, Snatch, and Tera Blast also lose one additional PP when used by an opposing Pokemon, but Sticky Web does not.
pressure.description: If this Pokemon is the target of a foe's move, that move loses one additional PP.

primordial-sea.name: primordial-sea
primordial-sea.shortEffect: On switch-in, heavy rain begins until this Ability is not active in battle.
primordial-sea.effect: On switch-in, the weather becomes Primordial Sea, which includes all the effects of Rain Dance and prevents damaging Fire-type moves from executing. This weather remains in effect until this Ability is no longer active for any Pokemon, or the weather is changed by the Delta Stream or Desolate Land Abilities.
primordial-sea.description: On switch-in, heavy rain begins until this Ability is not active in battle.

prism-armor.name: prism-armor
prism-armor.shortEffect: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
prism-armor.effect: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.
prism-armor.description: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

propeller-tail.name: propeller-tail
propeller-tail.shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.
propeller-tail.effect: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.
propeller-tail.description: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.

protean.name: protean
protean.shortEffect: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.
protean.effect: This Pokemon's type changes to match the type of the move it is about to use. This effect comes after all effects that change a move's type. This effect can only happen once per switch-in, and only if this Pokemon is not Terastallized.
protean.description: This Pokemon's type changes to the type of the move it is using. Once per switch-in.

protosynthesis.name: protosynthesis
protosynthesis.shortEffect: Sunny Day active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.
protosynthesis.effect: If Sunny Day is active or this Pokemon uses a held Booster Energy, this Pokemon's highest stat is multiplied by 1.3, or by 1.5 if the highest stat is Speed. Stat stage changes are considered at the time this Ability activates. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order. If this effect was started by Sunny Day, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Sunny Day is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.
protosynthesis.description: Sunny Day active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.

psychic-surge.name: psychic-surge
psychic-surge.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.
psychic-surge.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.
psychic-surge.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Psychic Terrain.

punk-rock.name: punk-rock
punk-rock.shortEffect: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from sound moves. Its own have 1.3x power.
punk-rock.effect: This Pokemon's sound-based moves have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes halved damage from sound-based moves.
punk-rock.description: This Pokemon receives 1/2 damage from sound moves. Its own have 1.3x power.

purifying-salt.name: purifying-salt
purifying-salt.shortEffect: Ghost damage to this Pokemon dealt with a halved offensive stat; can't be statused.
purifying-salt.effect: This Pokemon cannot become affected by a non-volatile status condition or Yawn. If a Pokemon uses a Ghost-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon.
purifying-salt.description: Ghost damage to this Pokemon dealt with a halved offensive stat; can't be statused.

quark-drive.name: quark-drive
quark-drive.shortEffect: Electric Terrain active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.
quark-drive.effect: If Electric Terrain is active or this Pokemon uses a held Booster Energy, this Pokemon's highest stat is multiplied by 1.3, or by 1.5 if the highest stat is Speed. Stat stage changes are considered at the time this Ability activates. If multiple stats are tied, Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, and Speed are prioritized in that order. If this effect was started by Electric Terrain, a held Booster Energy will not activate and the effect ends when Electric Terrain is no longer active. If this effect was started by a held Booster Energy, it ends when this Pokemon is no longer active.
quark-drive.description: Electric Terrain active or Booster Energy used: highest stat is 1.3x, or 1.5x if Speed.

queenly-majesty.name: queenly-majesty
queenly-majesty.shortEffect: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.
queenly-majesty.effect: Priority moves used by opposing Pokemon targeting this Pokemon or its allies are prevented from having an effect.
queenly-majesty.description: This Pokemon and its allies are protected from opposing priority moves.

quick-draw.name: quick-draw
quick-draw.shortEffect: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to move first in its priority bracket with attacking moves.
quick-draw.effect: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to move first in its priority bracket with attacking moves.
quick-draw.description: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to move first in its priority bracket with attacking moves.

quick-feet.name: quick-feet
quick-feet.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is statused, its Speed is 1.5x; ignores Speed drop from paralysis.
quick-feet.effect: If this Pokemon has a non-volatile status condition, its Speed is multiplied by 1.5. This Pokemon ignores the paralysis effect of halving Speed.
quick-feet.description: If this Pokemon is statused, its Speed is 1.5x; ignores Speed drop from paralysis.

rain-dish.name: rain-dish
rain-dish.shortEffect: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.
rain-dish.effect: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon restores 1/16 of its maximum HP, rounded down, at the end of each turn. This effect is prevented if this Pokemon is holding a Utility Umbrella.
rain-dish.description: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon heals 1/16 of its max HP each turn.

rattled.name: rattled
rattled.shortEffect: Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type attack, or Intimidated.
rattled.effect: This Pokemon's Speed is raised by 1 stage if hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type attack, or if an opposing Pokemon affected this Pokemon with the Intimidate Ability.
rattled.description: Speed is raised 1 stage if hit by a Bug-, Dark-, or Ghost-type attack, or Intimidated.

receiver.name: receiver
receiver.shortEffect: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.
receiver.effect: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints. Abilities that cannot be copied are As One, Battle Bond, Comatose, Commander, Disguise, Embody Aspect, Flower Gift, Forecast, Hunger Switch, Ice Face, Illusion, Imposter, Multitype, Neutralizing Gas, Poison Puppeteer, Power Construct, Power of Alchemy, Protosynthesis, Quark Drive, Receiver, RKS System, Schooling, Shields Down, Stance Change, Tera Shell, Tera Shift, Teraform Zero, Trace, Wonder Guard, Zen Mode, and Zero to Hero.
receiver.description: This Pokemon copies the Ability of an ally that faints.

reckless.name: reckless
reckless.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have 1.2x power; not Struggle.
reckless.effect: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have their power multiplied by 1.2. Does not affect Struggle.
reckless.description: This Pokemon's attacks with recoil or crash damage have 1.2x power; not Struggle.

refrigerate.name: refrigerate
refrigerate.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Ice type and have 1.2x power.
refrigerate.effect: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves and have their power multiplied by 1.2. This effect comes after other effects that change a move's type, but before Ion Deluge and Electrify's effects.
refrigerate.description: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Ice type and have 1.2x power.

regenerator.name: regenerator
regenerator.shortEffect: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.
regenerator.effect: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.
regenerator.description: This Pokemon restores 1/3 of its maximum HP, rounded down, when it switches out.

ripen.name: ripen
ripen.shortEffect: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled.
ripen.effect: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled. Berries that restore HP or PP have the amount doubled, Berries that raise stat stages have the amount doubled, Berries that halve damage taken quarter it instead, and a Jaboca Berry or Rowap Berry has the attacker lose 1/4 of its maximum HP, rounded down.
ripen.description: When this Pokemon eats certain Berries, the effects are doubled.

rivalry.name: rivalry
rivalry.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks do 1.25x on same gender targets; 0.75x on opposite gender.
rivalry.effect: This Pokemon's attacks have their power multiplied by 1.25 against targets of the same gender or multiplied by 0.75 against targets of the opposite gender. There is no modifier if either this Pokemon or the target is genderless.
rivalry.description: This Pokemon's attacks do 1.25x on same gender targets; 0.75x on opposite gender.

rks-system.name: rks-system
rks-system.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is a Silvally, its type changes to match its held Memory.
rks-system.effect: If this Pokemon is a Silvally, its type changes to match its held Memory.
rks-system.description: If this Pokemon is a Silvally, its type changes to match its held Memory.

rock-head.name: rock-head
rock-head.shortEffect: This Pokemon does not take recoil damage besides Struggle/Life Orb/crash damage.
rock-head.effect: This Pokemon does not take recoil damage, except Struggle. Does not affect Life Orb damage or crash damage.
rock-head.description: This Pokemon does not take recoil damage besides Struggle/Life Orb/crash damage.

rocky-payload.name: rocky-payload
rocky-payload.shortEffect: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Rock-type attack.
rocky-payload.effect: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Rock-type attack.
rocky-payload.description: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Rock-type attack.

rough-skin.name: rough-skin
rough-skin.shortEffect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their max HP.
rough-skin.effect: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their maximum HP, rounded down.
rough-skin.description: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon lose 1/8 of their max HP.

sand-force.name: sand-force
sand-force.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Ground/Rock/Steel attacks do 1.3x in Sandstorm; immunity to it.
sand-force.effect: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Ground-, Rock-, and Steel-type attacks have their power multiplied by 1.3. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.
sand-force.description: This Pokemon's Ground/Rock/Steel attacks do 1.3x in Sandstorm; immunity to it.

sand-rush.name: sand-rush
sand-rush.shortEffect: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled; immunity to Sandstorm.
sand-rush.effect: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.
sand-rush.description: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled; immunity to Sandstorm.

sand-spit.name: sand-spit
sand-spit.shortEffect: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Sandstorm begins.
sand-spit.effect: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Sandstorm begins.
sand-spit.description: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Sandstorm begins.

sand-stream.name: sand-stream
sand-stream.shortEffect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sandstorm.
sand-stream.effect: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sandstorm.
sand-stream.description: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Sandstorm.

sand-veil.name: sand-veil
sand-veil.shortEffect: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x; immunity to Sandstorm.
sand-veil.effect: If Sandstorm is active, the accuracy of moves used against this Pokemon is multiplied by 0.8. This Pokemon takes no damage from Sandstorm.
sand-veil.description: If Sandstorm is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x; immunity to Sandstorm.

sap-sipper.name: sap-sipper
sap-sipper.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Attack is raised 1 stage if hit by a Grass move; Grass immunity.
sap-sipper.effect: This Pokemon is immune to Grass-type moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a Grass-type move.
sap-sipper.description: This Pokemon's Attack is raised 1 stage if hit by a Grass move; Grass immunity.

schooling.name: schooling
schooling.shortEffect: If user is Wishiwashi, changes to School Form if it has > 1/4 max HP, else Solo Form.
schooling.effect: On switch-in, if this Pokemon is a Wishiwashi that is level 20 or above and has more than 1/4 of its maximum HP left, it changes to School Form. If it is in School Form and its HP drops to 1/4 of its maximum HP or less, it changes to Solo Form at the end of the turn. If it is in Solo Form and its HP is greater than 1/4 its maximum HP at the end of the turn, it changes to School Form.
schooling.description: If user is Wishiwashi, changes to School Form if it has > 1/4 max HP, else Solo Form.

scrappy.name: scrappy
scrappy.shortEffect: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Immune to Intimidate.
scrappy.effect: This Pokemon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. This Pokemon is immune to the effect of the Intimidate Ability.
scrappy.description: Fighting, Normal moves hit Ghost. Immune to Intimidate.

screen-cleaner.name: screen-cleaner
screen-cleaner.shortEffect: On switch-in, the effects of Aurora Veil, Light Screen, and Reflect end for both sides.
screen-cleaner.effect: On switch-in, the effects of Aurora Veil, Light Screen, and Reflect end for both sides.
screen-cleaner.description: On switch-in, the effects of Aurora Veil, Light Screen, and Reflect end for both sides.

seed-sower.name: seed-sower
seed-sower.shortEffect: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Grassy Terrain begins.
seed-sower.effect: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Grassy Terrain begins.
seed-sower.description: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Grassy Terrain begins.

serene-grace.name: serene-grace
serene-grace.shortEffect: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled.
serene-grace.effect: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled. This effect stacks with the Rainbow effect, except for secondary effects that cause the target to flinch.
serene-grace.description: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled.

shadow-shield.name: shadow-shield
shadow-shield.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
shadow-shield.effect: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.
shadow-shield.description: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.

shadow-tag.name: shadow-tag
shadow-tag.shortEffect: Prevents foes from choosing to switch unless they also have this Ability.
shadow-tag.effect: Prevents opposing Pokemon from choosing to switch out, unless they are holding a Shed Shell, are a Ghost type, or also have this Ability.
shadow-tag.description: Prevents foes from choosing to switch unless they also have this Ability.

sharpness.name: sharpness
sharpness.shortEffect: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.
sharpness.effect: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.
sharpness.description: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

shed-skin.name: shed-skin
shed-skin.shortEffect: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.
shed-skin.effect: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.
shed-skin.description: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.

sheer-force.name: sheer-force
sheer-force.shortEffect: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have 1.3x power; nullifies the effects.

water-absorb.shortEffect: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Water moves; Water immunity.

water-absorb.description: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Water moves; Water immunity.

water-bubble.name: water-bubble
water-bubble.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Water power is 2x; it can't be burned; Fire power against it is halved.
water-bubble.effect: This Pokemon's offensive stat is doubled while using a Water-type attack. If a Pokemon uses a Fire-type attack against this Pokemon, that Pokemon's offensive stat is halved when calculating the damage to this Pokemon. This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.
water-bubble.description: This Pokemon's Water power is 2x; it can't be burned; Fire power against it is halved.

water-compaction.name: water-compaction
water-compaction.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages after it is damaged by a Water-type move.
water-compaction.effect: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages after it is damaged by a Water-type move.
water-compaction.description: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages after it is damaged by a Water-type move.

water-veil.name: water-veil
water-veil.shortEffect: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.
water-veil.effect: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.
water-veil.description: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.

weak-armor.name: weak-armor
weak-armor.shortEffect: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.
weak-armor.effect: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, its Defense is lowered by 1 stage and its Speed is raised by 2 stages.
weak-armor.description: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.

well-baked-body.name: well-baked-body
well-baked-body.shortEffect: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages if hit by a Fire move; Fire immunity.
well-baked-body.effect: This Pokemon is immune to Fire-type moves and raises its Defense by 2 stages when hit by a Fire-type move.
well-baked-body.description: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages if hit by a Fire move; Fire immunity.

white-smoke.name: white-smoke
white-smoke.shortEffect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
white-smoke.effect: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.
white-smoke.description: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

wimp-out.name: wimp-out
wimp-out.shortEffect: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.
wimp-out.effect: When this Pokemon has more than 1/2 its maximum HP and takes damage bringing it to 1/2 or less of its maximum HP, it immediately switches out to a chosen ally. This effect applies after all hits from a multi-hit move. This effect is prevented if the move had a secondary effect removed by the Sheer Force Ability. This effect applies to both direct and indirect damage, except Curse and Substitute on use, Belly Drum, Pain Split, and confusion damage.
wimp-out.description: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.

wind-power.name: wind-power
wind-power.shortEffect: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.
wind-power.effect: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when it takes a hit from a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.
wind-power.description: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.

wind-rider.name: wind-rider
wind-rider.shortEffect: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.
wind-rider.effect: This Pokemon is immune to wind moves and raises its Attack by 1 stage when hit by a wind move or when Tailwind begins on this Pokemon's side.
wind-rider.description: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.

wonder-guard.name: wonder-guard
wonder-guard.shortEffect: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.
wonder-guard.effect: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.
wonder-guard.description: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.

wonder-skin.name: wonder-skin
wonder-skin.shortEffect: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.
wonder-skin.effect: Non-damaging moves that check accuracy have their accuracy changed to 50% when used against this Pokemon. This effect comes before other effects that modify accuracy.
wonder-skin.description: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.

zen-mode.name: zen-mode
zen-mode.shortEffect: If Darmanitan, at end of turn changes Mode to Standard if > 1/2 max HP, else Zen.
zen-mode.effect: If this Pokemon is a Darmanitan or Galarian Darmanitan, it changes to Zen Mode if it has 1/2 or less of its maximum HP at the end of a turn. If Darmanitan's HP is above 1/2 of its maximum HP at the end of a turn, it changes back to Standard Mode.
zen-mode.description: If Darmanitan, at end of turn changes Mode to Standard if > 1/2 max HP, else Zen.

zero-to-hero.name: zero-to-hero
zero-to-hero.shortEffect: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.
zero-to-hero.effect: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.
zero-to-hero.description: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.
